title: Threads, Atomics, Data Races, and Safe Reclamation
description: A lock-free metrics cache removes nodes while readers still hold addresses and ordinary tests rarely reproduce the race. Learners cumulatively produce threaded lifetime and reclamation proof through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Identify conflicting non-atomic accesses without happens-before ordering as undefined behavior.
Select atomic operations and memory order from a stated synchronization proof instead of folklore.
Publish fully initialized objects with ordering and retain their lifetime until every reader is finished.
